raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Stiprinajees / un turrajs
Gr: drohſchu Prahtu / jo tew buhs
ſcheem Laudim to Semmi par
cemantojamu Teefu iſdallibt/ ko
es winxo Tehweem ſwehrejis ef-
um winxeem doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Stiprinajees tikai/un tur-
rajs itt drohſchu Prahtu / ka tu
turri/ un darri pehz wiſſas Bau-
ſlibas / fo Mohſus mans Kalps
tew irr pawehlejis / ne atkahpi no
tahs / nei pa labbo / nei pa kreifo
Rohku / ka tu ſaprattigi warri
darriht/ wiſſur kur tu eeti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Lai ſchahs Bauſlibas-Grah-
imata ne atſtahj no tawas Mut-
tes / bet apdohtmajees eekſch tahs
Deena un Nakti/ka tu warri tur-
reht un darriht wiſſu / kas eekſch
tahs rakſtihts stahw/ tad taweeim
Selkeem labbi iſdohſees / un tad
tu ſaprattigi turreſees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neggi es tew to eſmu pa-
wehlejis? Stiprinajees / un tur-
rajs drohſchu Prahtu/ ne behda-
jees / un ne baillojees / jo tas
KUNGŠ taws Deews irr ar te-
win / wiſſur kurp tu eeti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad pawehleja Josuü̈s
teem Lauschu Wirſneekeem / un
fazzija :
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eita widdu zaur to Lehge-
ri / un pawehlejt teem Laudim/
fazzidami: Taſſajt preeſch jums
Zelta-Barribu/jo pehz trim Dee-
nahm eeſeet juhs pahr ſcho Jar-
dann/ ka juhs ee-eetat eemantoht
Semmi / fo tas KUNGŠ
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Josuü̈s runnaja ue
teem Rubbenitereem/ un Gadite-
reem/ un to puſſ Zitti Manaffus/
un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Atminneet to Wahrdut/fo
Mohſus ta KUNGŠ Kalps jume
irr pawehlejis/ fazzidams : Ta-
KUNGŠ juhſu Deews doh-
jums Duſſeschann/un dohd jume
ſcho Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Laid juhſu Seewas/ juh-
Behrnixi/ juhſo gannami Puſki
tai Semmē paleek / fo Mohſu-
ſchai puſſ Jardannas jums derwi
irr/ bet juhs eita apbruuxnoti juh-
ſo Brahtu Preekſcha/ wiſſi ſpeh-
zigi un ſtipri Wihrt / un palih-
dseet winxeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teekanis tas KUNGŠ
juhſeem Brahteem Duſſechann
dohd / itt ka jums / ka arridsa-
wixxi to Semmi eemanto/ fo ta-
KUNGŠ juhſo Deews winxeem
dohd : Tad atgreeſifectees juh-
us to Semmi juhſu Ihpachhu-
ma / un turrefeet to eemante-
jama Teefa/ fo Mohſus ta KUNG-
GA Kalps jums dewis irr / ſcha-
Jardannas Puſſe/ prett Rihteem
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja tee Josuü̈s
fazzidami: Wiſſu / fo tu mum-
eſſi pawehlejis / darrixtim mehſ-
un wiſſur / kurp tu muhs fuhtiſ-
eejim mehſ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Itt ka mehs wiſſas Leeta-
Mohſum eſſim klaustifschi / t-
klaustifsim mehs tewim/ lat tik-
tas KUNGŠ taws Deews a-
tewi
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
